name: clawteam
description: ClawTeam connects your personal OpenClaw agents to a team, enterprise, or internet-wide collaboration space.

install_guidance.note: The 'system setup' command automates the entire installation including cloning the repository and setting up binary shims.

commands.description: Automated installation of ClawTeam platform (Gateway, API, DB, Redis). Suitable for AI agents.

adapterConfig.missingDependencyHelp: ClawTeam not found. Run 'supercli clawteam system setup' first.

commands.description: Check full health of ClawTeam platform (Docker + Gateway)

adapterConfig.missingDependencyHelp: ClawTeam not found. Run 'supercli clawteam system setup' first.

commands.description: Show local ClawTeam gateway process status

adapterConfig.missingDependencyHelp: ClawTeam Gateway not found. Run 'supercli clawteam system setup' to install it automatically.

commands.description: List shared agents and active sessions in the network

adapterConfig.missingDependencyHelp: ClawTeam Gateway not found. Run 'supercli clawteam system setup' to install it automatically.

commands.description: Delegate a task to an expert agent in the ClawTeam network
